question: For students who have pets , how many pets does each student have ? list their ids instead of names .
gold_sql: select count(*) ,  t1.stuid from student as t1 join has_pet as t2 on t1.stuid  =  t2.stuid group by t1.stuid
gold_sql_original: select count(*) ,  t1.stuid from student as t1 join has_pet as t2 on t1.stuid  =  t2.stuid group by t1.stuid
gold_sql_canonical: select count(*) ,  t1.stuid from student as t1 join has_pet as t2 on t1.stuid  =  t2.stuid group by t1.stuid
agent_sql: SELECT student.StuID AS StuID, COUNT(*) AS pet_count FROM student JOIN has_pet ON student.StuID = has_pet.StuID GROUP BY student.StuID LIMIT 100
safe_sql: SELECT student.StuID AS StuID, COUNT(*) AS pet_count FROM student JOIN has_pet ON student.StuID = has_pet.StuID GROUP BY student.StuID LIMIT 100
agent_answer:
Students who have pets have the following pet counts:

- Student ID 1001 has 1 pet.
- Student ID 1002 has 2 pets.
